expectations.text: Migration checklist enumerates all 12 single-release-cycle steps with text matching HashiCorp's verbatim titles
Step 7 of the checklist explicitly notes that tests are written/updated first and run red before code changes (TDD ordering)
expectations.evidence: matched: tests to use the framework, and ensure that the tests fail

expectations.text: Step 2 (review for SDKv2 data-consistency errors) is present in the checklist
The audit report identifies at least one file under 'needs manual review'
No source files in the provider clone have been modified (git status clean)
The produced inventory artefact is under 100 KB
